title: Billions of Dollars in Valuation & Defining an ENTIRE Market: The OfBusiness Success Story

key_insights: The importance of understanding the world as an input into what you're doing when building a business.
Defining how to build and run a business based on someone who has built and run a business, rather than someone who hasn't.
The value of being vulnerable about problems or issues in order to build trust with others.
market_gaps: The need for India-specific solutions in the B2B space
The lack of institutions that can provide long-term support and guidance to entrepreneurs
strategies: Company first: prioritizing the company's goals over individual interests
Vulnerability: being open and honest about problems or issues in order to build trust with others
quotable_moments: When you start thinking company first, you start doing things that you guys have done, which is amazing.
intelligence.target_audience: Entrepreneurs, founders, and business leaders looking for insights on building successful companies and institutions in India
